Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests

Class FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.AbstractTacticTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests
public class FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests extends AbstractTacticTests
Unit tests for the auto-tactic FunAppInDomGoalAutoTac

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static enum 
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.FunAndRel
    Enumeration of all the relation and function : REL : "↔" (Relation) TREL : "" (Total Relation) SREL : "" (Surjective Relation) STREL : "" (Total Surjective Relation) PFUN : "⇸" (Partial Function) TFUN : "→" (Total Function) PINJ : "⤔" (Partial Injection) TINJ : "↣" (Total Injection) PSUR : "⤀" (Partial Surjection) TSUR : "↠" (Total Surjection) TBIJ : "⤖" (Bijection)
    private static enum 
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.PFunAndPRel
    Enumeration of all the partial function and not total relation : REL : "↔" (Relation) SREL : "" (Surjective Relation) PFUN : "⇸" (Partial Function) PINJ : "⤔" (Partial Injection) PSUR : "⤀" (Partial Surjection)
    private static enum 
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.TFunAndTRel
    Enumeration of all the total function and total relation: TREL : "" (Total Relation) STREL : "" (Total Surjective Relation) TFUN : "→" (Total Function) TINJ : "↣" (Total Injection) TSUR : "↠" (Total Surjection) TBIJ : "⤖" (Bijection)

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    apply()
    Asserts that the auto-tactic succeeds on the following sequent : H, f∈A *op1* B, g∈C *op2* D, B *incl* C ⊦ f(x)∈dom(g) Where : op1 is a relation or a function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.FunAndRel op2 is a total relation or a total function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.TFunAndTRel incl is an inclusion Inclusion
    void
    failsOnGoals()
    Asserts that the auto-tactic fails when : the goal is not an inclusion right member of the goal is not a domain left member of the goal is not a function application
    void
    failsOnHypothesis()
    Asserts that the auto-tactic fails when : there is not the needed inclusion as hypothesis definition of one the function f is not an inclusion or there is twice a definition of g definition of one the function g is not an inclusion or there is twice a definition of f
    void
    failsTypeRelation()
    Asserts that the auto-tactic fails on the following sequent : H, f∈A *op1* B, g∈C *op2* D, B *incl* C ⊦ f(x)∈dom(g) Where : op1 is a relation or a function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.FunAndRel op2 is a partial relation or not a total function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.PFunAndPRel inlc is an inclusion Inclusion

    Methods inherited from class org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.AbstractTacticTests

    addToTypeEnvironment, assertFailure, assertSuccess, genProofTreeNode, parseExpression, parsePredicate, setFormulaFactory, tacticRegistered

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests

      public FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests()

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public void apply()
      Asserts that the auto-tactic succeeds on the following sequent :
      • H, f∈A *op1* B, g∈C *op2* D, B *incl* C ⊦ f(x)∈dom(g)
      Where :
      • op1 is a relation or a function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.FunAndRel
      • op2 is a total relation or a total function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.TFunAndTRel
      • incl is an inclusion Inclusion

    • failsTypeRelation

      public void failsTypeRelation()
      Asserts that the auto-tactic fails on the following sequent :
      • H, f∈A *op1* B, g∈C *op2* D, B *incl* C ⊦ f(x)∈dom(g)
      Where :
      • op1 is a relation or a function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.FunAndRel
      • op2 is a partial relation or not a total function FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests.PFunAndPRel
      • inlc is an inclusion Inclusion

    • failsOnGoals

      public void failsOnGoals()
      Asserts that the auto-tactic fails when :
      • the goal is not an inclusion
      • right member of the goal is not a domain
      • left member of the goal is not a function application

    • failsOnHypothesis

      public void failsOnHypothesis()
      Asserts that the auto-tactic fails when :
      • there is not the needed inclusion as hypothesis
      • definition of one the function f is not an inclusion or there is twice a definition of g
      • definition of one the function g is not an inclusion or there is twice a definition of f
